title: Odlo Thermal Base Layer - Warm & Breathable
short_description: High-quality base layer for cold days. Provides reliable warmth, wicks moisture away, and dries quickly.
long_description: The Odlo thermal base layer is the perfect foundation for outdoor activities in cold weather. The innovative material keeps your body warm while effectively wicking sweat away. Even after intense climbs, the base layer dries in no time. Flat seams prevent chafing and irritation.
buying_angle: Especially appealing for campers who prioritize practical features in clothing: optimal thermal insulation, moisture wicking, quick-drying.
